name: agentix-embed-code-ts
description: nomic-embed-code int8 ONNX weights in a TypeScript npm package — incbin-style

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:cli
scripts.release: node scripts/pipeline.js && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") models/nomic-embed-code-v1-int8.onnx models/model-descriptor.json --title "nomic-embed-code v1 int8 ONNX" --notes "Pre-exported nomic-embed-code v1 int8 ONNX model for embed-code-ts."
